news.summary: Shares of Krispy Kreme, Inc. (NASDAQ: DNUT) are experiencing a decrease in trading value following the company's announcement of an adjusted loss per share of five cents for the first quarter. This figure aligns with predictions made by analysts. The first-quarter sales amounted to $375.18 million, reflecting a 15.3% decrease compared to the previous year and falling short of the anticipated $384.376 million by market analysts. The organic revenue witnessed a decline of 1% to $374.7 million due to subdued consumer demand, leading to a reduction in doughnut shop transactions. The drop in revenues is primarily attributed to a $64.3 million decrease resulting from the divestiture of a majority stake in Insomnia Cookies during the third quarter of fiscal 2024.
news.headline: Krispy Kreme's stock falls after warning with Q1 loss of 5 cents per share, $375.18M sales (down 15.3%), and 1% revenue decline.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was highlighted that the global unemployment rate has risen to 6% in the first quarter of this year, representing an increase from the previous year. The data indicated that approximately 200 million people were unemployed worldwide during this period. Moreover, it was noted that the youth unemployment rate was even higher, reaching 13% globally. The report also pointed out that the COVID-19 pandemic has significantly impacted job markets, leading to job losses and economic challenges in many countries. Additionally, it was mentioned that efforts are being made to address these issues and support job creation to combat the negative effects of the pandemic on employment.
news.headline: Trump praises UK trade deal, says more tariff agreements to come.

news.summary: On Thursday, the GENIUS Act faced a setback as it did not secure enough votes in the Senate, casting doubt on the fate of the stablecoin bill and other cryptocurrency-related laws. The bill failed to pass a crucial Senate vote, raising concerns about its prospects moving forward. This development has created uncertainty surrounding the future of the proposed legislation.
news.headline: Stablecoin bill faces setback as GENIUS Act doesn't pass Senate vote, impacting crypto legislation's fate.

news.summary: The price of Bitcoin surged past $101,000 while former President Donald Trump urged U.S. Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell to reduce interest rates once again.

news.summary: Match Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MTCH) saw a decrease in its stock value following the release of its fiscal first-quarter results. The company reported a total revenue of $831.2 million, which was a 3% drop compared to the previous year. The number of payers also decreased by 5% to 14.2 million. Although the analyst consensus estimate was $827.5 million, the actual revenue surpassed it. The GAAP EPS of $0.44 fell short of the analyst consensus estimate of $0.45. Notably, Tinder revenue experienced a 7% decline year-over-year, while Hinge revenue saw a notable 23% increase compared to the previous year. This full news piece can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Investors unmatch with Tinder stock as Match Group Inc. revenue drops 3% to $831.2M in Q1, with payers at 14.2M. Tinder revenue down 7%, Hinge up 23%.

news.summary: Eaton, an intelligent power management company, revealed plans to expand its Orchard Park, N.Y., facility to meet the rising demand for aerospace mission systems solutions. The $18.5 million investment aims to boost production capacity to cater to the increasing needs of military defense, commercial aerospace, and space customers. This expansion will also create 77 new skilled manufacturing roles in the community. By enhancing operations in Orchard Park, Eaton is positioned to better serve its diverse customer base in these sectors.
news.headline: Eaton invests $18.5M in Orchard Park, NY aerospace facility, adding 77 jobs to support growing demand.

news.summary: Westlake Royal Building Products™, a subsidiary of Westlake (NYSE: WLK), will serve as the main sponsor for the National Association of Home Builders' National Home Remodeling Month for the fourth year in a row. This campaign, which takes place every May, aims to honor the remodeling sector, showcase the skills of remodeling experts, and underscore the advantages of employing professional remodelers.
news.headline: Westlake Royal Building Products sponsors NAHB's National Home Remodeling Month for fourth year. Celebrates remodeling industry in May.

news.summary: Associated Capital Group, a diversified financial services company, reported its first quarter financial results for March 31, 2025. The Merger Arbitrage strategy performed at 3.8% before expenses and 2.8% after expenses. Assets Under Management (AUM) were $1.27 billion as of March 31, 2025, compared to $1.25 billion at the end of 2024. Book value per share stood at $42.51 per share in March 2025. Revenues for the quarter were $2.1 million; net income was $7.7 million. The effective tax rate for the quarter was 26.3%. The alternative investment strategy offerings were highlighted, focusing on the merger arbitrage strategy. They reported that the long-standing fund in the merger arbitrage strategy generated gross returns of 3.77% (2.81% net of fees) for the quarter. Overall, Associated Capital Group remains optimistic about its growth prospects, despite an uncertain environment, and Patrick Huvane was named Interim CEO following Doug Jamieson's retirement.
news.headline: Associated Capital Group, Inc. reported 3.8% performance for Merger Arbitrage in Q1, with AUM at $1.27 billion and Book Value per share at $42.51. CEO transitioned, Patrick Huvane appointed Interim CEO. Net income was $7.669 million, total operating expenses were $6.3 million, and the effective tax rate for Q1 2025 was 26.3%. AUM increased from year-end 2024 due to market appreciation, currency fluctuations, offset by outflows. Merger Arbitrage strategy generated 3.77% gross returns in Q1 2025.

news.summary: SEC is considering rule changes to allow companies to issue tokenized securities with fewer registration requirements. Commissioner Hester Peirce mentioned a potential exemptive order for firms using blockchain to release them from regulations. This means decentralized exchanges like Uniswap may not need to register as broker-dealers or exchanges. These companies would still need to prevent fraud and meet disclosure requirements. Under the new leadership, the SEC has shifted its stance on crypto oversight, focusing on fraud prevention and market manipulation. Former SEC Chair Gensler pursued lawsuits against crypto firms, but current chair Paul Atkins has narrowed the agency's focus to certain cryptocurrencies. The SEC stated that some memecoins and stablecoins may not qualify as securities under US law if they are purely speculative or marketed for payments.
news.headline: SEC is considering rule changes to permit easier issuance of tokenized securities without certain registration requirements, including for DEXs. SEC shifting stance on cryptocurrency oversight under new leadership. companies must still follow anti-fraud rules & disclosure requirements.Source: SEC.

news.summary: The stock market saw widespread gains today as investor sentiment was boosted by a trade agreement between the U.S. and Britain, easing concerns. Notably, Robinhood performed well. The Dow Jones surged by 600 points following news of the trade deal. Boeing also showed strong performance, surpassing its buy point.
news.headline: Dow Jones surges 600 points on U.S.-UK trade deal; Boeing soars. Robinhood breaks out. Broad market gains.

news.summary: On May 8, 2025, the Beer Institute released their unofficial estimate for March 2025, stating that beer brewers had taxable removals shipments of approximately 12,500,000 barrels. This marked a 0.7% increase from the March 2024 removals, which were measured at 12,414,404 barrels. Looking at the taxable removals data for the first quarter of 2025 compared to 2024, there was an overall decrease in shipments. January 2025 saw 10,550,000 barrels shipped, an 8.7% decrease from January 2024. February 2025 had 10,300,000 barrels shipped, a 14.9% decline from the previous year. On a year-to-date basis for 2025, there were 33,350,000 barrels shipped, reflecting a 7.5% decrease from the same period in 2024. Additional details on this report can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Beer Institute's March 2025 report shows 12.5M barrels of beer shipped, up 0.7% from March 2024's 12.4M barrels.

news.headline: TWC Enterprises Limited shares voting results from 2025 Annual Meeting; all Directors elected.

Key products contributing to this growth included a 26 million euro rise in the corporate loan portfolio, a 20 million euro increase in the home loan portfolio, and a 9 million euro growth in the consumer loan portfolio.
news.headline: Bigbank AS loan portfolio increased by 55 million euros in April 2025, with corporate loans up by 26 million, home loans by 20 million, and consumer loans by 9 million.

Sununu's new role follows his four-term governorship and demonstrates confidence in Scope Labs Capital's early-stage investment strategy. With Sununu's expertise in operations, finance, and governance, this move signifies a strategic addition to the team.

news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Strategic Intelligence: Tariffs and Trade Wars Executive Briefing (First Edition)" has now been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's available offerings. The report delves into the effects of tariffs on a global scale, focusing on various industries. It offers analysis on the macroeconomic consequences and forecasts the potential outcomes in the upcoming weeks and months. This report provides in-depth insights on the tariff impact on 15 sectors, namely aerospace, defense, security, and agriculture.
news.headline: "Report on trade wars & tariffs impact across 15 sectors, highlighting macroeconomic analysis. - ResearchAndMarkets.com"

news.summary: In Chicago, Hyatt Hotels Corporation (NYSE: H), along with the Scalesciani family, owners of Palacio Duhau - Park Hyatt Buenos Aires, and the David family, Mendoza entrepreneurs, unveiled intentions to establish Casa Duhau in Mendoza. This luxury hotel will consist of 52 villas and suites, making it the sole property in The Unbound Collection by Hyatt in Argentina. Situated within Reserva Alto Agrelo, a forthcoming project covering almost 1,000 acres, Casa Duhau will be accompanied by a high-end winery.
news.headline: Hyatt to expand luxury portfolio in Argentina with Casa Duhau - new hotel to have 52 villas and suites.

news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that a record-breaking number of 3.2 million jobs were added to the economy last month, surpassing all previous estimates. The unemployment rate also fell to a historic low of 4.2%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Additionally, wage growth saw a significant increase of 5.1% compared to the previous year, indicating a strong and prosperous labor market. These positive indicators suggest a robust economic recovery and job market resilience in the face of ongoing challenges.
news.headline: American Cardinal Robert Francis Prevost makes history with election as first American Pope.

news.summary: Verifyle has partnered with the National Behavioral Health Association of Providers (NBHAP), a prominent advocate for addiction-focused treatment programs. As a leader in secure communication and file sharing, Verifyle will offer its ultra-secure document sharing, messaging, and digital signature services to NBHAP. NBHAP represents the interests of the behavioral health and addiction treatment sectors, providing education and advocacy. This partnership aims to enhance information exchange within the industry.
news.headline: Verifyle partners with National Behavioral Health Association of Providers to enhance security for patients and providers.

news.summary: Shares of Fortinet Inc. (NASDAQ: FTNT) experienced a decline in trading on Thursday following the release of their first-quarter 2025 financial results. Despite beating the consensus estimate with adjusted earnings of 58 cents per share (compared to the expected 53 cents), the revenue of $1.54 billion aligned with analyst predictions. However, the slightly underwhelming guidance for the second quarter seems to have influenced the market sentiment. Fortinet projected a revenue range of $1.59 billion to $1.65 billion for Q2, with a midpoint of $1.62 billion, falling short of the $1.63 billion estimate. Additionally, the company reiterated its full-year guidance of $6.65 billion to $6.85 billion, while the consensus stood at $6.76 billion. In terms of adjusted earnings for Q2, Fortinet forecasted a range of 58 to 60 cents per share. The detailed report is accessible on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Fortinet stock falls as Q1 2025 revenue matches expectations but guidance is soft. Q2 revenue guided at $1.59B-$1.65B and full-year at $6.65B-$6.85B, with adjusted earnings of 58-60 cents per share.

news.summary: A company named Emelx has recently launched luxury airport transfer services in Southern California. The services cater to travelers from the US and Canada, providing upscale transportation to and from major airports like LAX, SNA, and SAN. Emelx specializes in black car and shuttle transportation, offering a premium experience for discerning customers. The expansion aims to serve a wider clientele seeking a seamless and sophisticated airport transfer service in the region.
news.headline: Emelx launches luxury airport transport services across Southern California for US and Canadian travelers, serving major airports like LAX, SNA, SAN.

news.summary: Bitcoin reached the $100,000 milestone for the first time in three months, sparking discussions about whether this marks the beginning of a sustained bull run. Experts emphasize the shift towards real-world applications for Bitcoin rather than just passive holding. Christian Thompson, Managing Director at the Sui Foundation, highlighted the evolving narrative around Bitcoin, focusing on its use for borrowing, lending, and accessing new financial tools. He compared this shift to the transition from plug-in to battery-powered tools, noting increased mobility and accessibility. Platforms like Sui are facilitating the development of practical and secure applications. Thompson suggests that this milestone signifies a new era for Bitcoin in global finance.
news.headline: Bitcoin surpasses $100,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin rise 10%; experts debate future implications on global finance.

news.summary: Today, Hillhurst Biopharmaceuticals, Inc. (Hillhurst Bio), based in San Diego, revealed they have secured $6.3 million in grant funding for their Phase 2a clinical study focusing on Parkinson's disease. This award will support their innovative liquid drug products.
news.headline: Hillhurst Bio gets $6.3M grants from Farmer Family Foundation and Michael J. Fox Foundation for Parkinson's study.

news.summary: A total of 243 talented young spellers are set to gather at National Harbor, Maryland from May 27-29 for the prestigious Scripps National Spelling Bee. This event holds special significance as it commemorates the 100th anniversary of this renowned American competition, which had its inaugural edition...
news.headline: 243 young spellers will compete in the historic 100th Scripps National Spelling Bee in National Harbor, Maryland.

news.summary: Analyst Michael McGovern from BofA Securities has reaffirmed a Buy rating on Carvana Co (NYSE: CVNA) stock and increased the price target from $290 to $295. Carvana had a successful quarter, reporting a 46% year-over-year growth in unit sales. The company exceeded expectations by posting revenues of $4.23 billion and EBITDA of $488 million, compared to consensus estimates of $3.99 billion and $434 million, respectively. Retail units totaled 134,000, surpassing the projected 127,000, with retail GPU hitting $3,308, $55 more than estimated. The total GPU slightly missed the projection at $7,120 vs. $7,160. Financing revenue per unit rose by 5% quarter-over-quarter to $2,900. Management emphasized improvements in operational efficiency, fixed cost leverage, and advertising effectiveness. Free cash flow reached $205 million, beating the Street's forecast.
news.headline: Carvana's Q1 results exceed expectations: Revenue $4.23B, EBITDA $488M, retail units 134,000, GPU $3,308. Stock price forecast raised to $295.

news.summary: Dentsply Sirona Inc.'s stock (NASDAQ: XRAY) saw a significant 15% surge on Thursday, marking its largest single-day increase since 2019. The company exceeded expectations with adjusted earnings per share of 43 cents for the first quarter of 2025, surpassing the estimated 30 cents. Reporting sales of $879 million, Dentsply Sirona outperformed the expected $854.75 million consensus. In comparison to the first quarter of 2024, first-quarter net sales witnessed a 7.7% decrease (with organic sales down 4.4%). Foreign currency fluctuations had a negative impact of around $30 million on net sales in the first quarter of 2025. Excluding Byte sales, organic sales remained relatively steady in the first quarter, showing growth in two of the three regions. The company's adjusted EBITDA margin expanded, largely attributed to the advantages from transformational initiatives and internal financial management. Dentsply Sirona's advancements in customer-centric innovation are driving progress.
news.headline: Dentsply Sirona's stock surges 15% as it beat Q1 earnings estimates with $879 million in sales, a 7.7% decrease, biggest rally since 2019.
